notes: Deployed classifier for Phase 10a-prelim transfer test. Trained on ALL 283 RME clips (no LOSO). Decision_function output distribution differs from Phase 8b's per-fold classifiers — see D4 classifier-shift caveat in pre-reg. Applied to Prudnik via DLC ear-keypoint crop + V-JEPA-2 → this classifier → sigmoid(score/T_median=0.494).
